g.text: Per-channel quantization uses dim=0 (output channel dimension) for all layer types
Each output channel produces one element of the output → quantized independently
Note: C_out = number of output channels (always at dim=0)

text.tspan: # Channel dimension is ALWAYS 0 for per-channel quantization
# Channel dimension is ALWAYS 0 for per-channel quantization

g.text: Row i = weights for output channel i
Slice [i, :, :, :] = kernel for output channel i
